---
title: "AI for Coding"
sidebar: false
toc: true
---

*Placeholder – brief course description goes here.*

---

*Placeholder – full course syllabus goes here.*

*Placeholder – session schedule, dates, and topics go here.*

|---------|------|-------|
| 1 | TBD | *Placeholder* |
| 2 | TBD | *Placeholder* |
| 3 | TBD | *Placeholder* |

*Placeholder – list of learning objectives goes here.*

## Logistics & Organisation

*Placeholder – logistics, access, communication channels, etc.*
